case_title: C.P.I. COMMERCIAL PROPERTY INVESTMENTS, INC. vs. AGUILAR, RACHEL et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT AGUILAR, RACHEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.P.I. COMMERCIAL PROPERTY INVESTMENTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, RACHEL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C.P.I. COMMERCIAL PROPERTY INVESTMENTS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, RACHEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 729 LEAVENWORTH STREET, APT. #22, SF, CA $1,074.77 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,694.77, STAYED UNTIL JUN-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT IS STAYED THROUGH 6/1/94 AND MAYBE VACATED PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
